meaning: n.妫橀硩绫荤儹甯︽贰姘撮奔,涓介奔绉戦奔
examples: Angelfish are an easy-to-keep cichlid species.
Angelfish are an easy - to - keep cichlid species.
Discus: Belongs to cichlid of tropical fish, but divided in one as per its unique shape.
In addition, there is growing circumstantial evidence for hybrid speciation in Ragoletis fruit flies, swordtail fish and African cichlid fish.
More impressively, the cichlid fishes of Lake Victoria have generated 500 forms in about 14, 000 years (lakes are islands of water).
